description: A clean designed promotional/infographic graphic on a pale blue-gray background advertising a USCIS digital tool. At top, blue sans-serif text reads 'The Alien Registration Requirement Determination Tool will help you determine if you need to register.' Below is a simple line-art illustration of a web browser window (with three dashes/tab marks and a small USCIS/DHS seal plus 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' label in the corner) containing three interlocking red gear/cog icons, symbolizing an online tool/process. Overlaid prominently is the program's logo: a large blue 'ARR' wordmark wrapped by a red swoosh, with 'Alien Registration Requirement' spelled out beneath. The technique is straightforward government-service promotion driving immigrants ('aliens') to a compliance tool. Target audience: noncitizens who may be subject to the Alien Registration Requirement.
notable_text: The Alien Registration Requirement Determination Tool will help you determine if you need to register. / ARR – Alien Registration Requirement
